exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your creative writing forward
items: Create a detailed one-page story concept outline including main character, central conflict, and story arc
Read and analyze 3 published works in your target genre to identify common structural patterns and techniques
Write down 10 specific story ideas or character concepts and choose your top 3 to develop further
Research and join 2 writing communities (online forums, local groups, or workshops) and introduce yourself
Purchase or borrow 3 essential writing craft books and create a reading plan to study them over the next month
Complete a writing skills assessment by writing 500 words in 3 different styles (dialogue, description, and action)
